actions.value:
I am sorry that you were a victim of a scam.

Cryptocurrency transactions are not reversible which is why bad actors elect to use digital assets like BTC.

From this point on, the only way to get your money back is from the organization that took it or by pursuing legal means of recourse.

 

We always advise filing a report with your local law enforcement so there is a record of what happened.

You may want to consider reviewing this article: I've been victim of a scam! What should I do?

 

For additional support you can submit your case here: https://www.chainabuse.com/report?source=edge

Chainabuse collects scam issues and is a great resource of information.

 

If you have any questions please let me know.
